live_crawl_deferral_criteria: Use deterministic fixtures before any network activity.
Defer live crawl unless a reviewer approves a bounded source group.
robots_policy_preflight_checklist_rows: Confirm robots handling for each source group.
no_raw_body_persistence_reminders: Do not commit raw response bodies or downloaded documents.
processor_handoff_manifest_expectations: Manifest lists fixture ids, normalized output ids, and validation status.
Manifest excludes private session state and raw crawl bodies.
